response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified song title 'Lion' from on-screen text. 2. Identified 'Yoko Kanno' as the composer/artist associated with the song 'Macross Frontier'. 3. Search query used: '"Lion" "Yoko Kanno" "Macross Frontier" Japanese and English lyrics'. 4. Found song information and verified lyrics. 5. Mapped the entire performance as one main musical scene.
response.global_summary: A cover performance of the song 'Lion' from the anime 'Macross Frontier', performed by two animated characters (VTubers).

scenes.description: Two animated characters dance and sing to the song 'Lion'. Text on screen indicates 'Lion', 'Lyrics: 菅野よう子' (Yoko Kanno), 'Music: Gabriela Robin'.
